nigrahaṇa (wie eben)

results.rendered_html:
nigrahaṇa a. Holding back or down, suppressing.
— ṇaṃ
1 Subduing, suppression.
2 Capture, confinement.
3 Chastisement, punishment in general.
4 Defeat.
